results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure providing secure, isolated cloud sandboxes (VMs) for running AI-generated code. It enables AI data analysis, code interpretation, and agent environments.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure for running AI-generated code in secure, isolated cloud sandboxes, controllable via JavaScript or Python SDKs.

results.title: E2B Dashboard
results.description: E2B Dashboard is a modern, feature-rich web application built with Next.js 15 and React 19 to manage and monitor E2B services, providing a seamless user experience for managing sandboxes, API keys, and usage analytics.

results.title: E2B Cookbook
results.description: Example code and guides for building with the E2B SDK, showcasing various LLM providers and use cases like data analysis and code interpretation.

results.title: E2B Infrastructure
results.description: E2B Infrastructure is an open-source platform providing the underlying infrastructure for E2B's AI code interpreting capabilities, supporting self-hosting with Terraform on various cloud providers like GCP and AWS.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK
results.description: The E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK provides programmatic access to secure, open-source virtual desktops, enabling users to create, launch applications, and stream virtual computer environments for AI agents and other automated tasks.

results.title: E2B JavaScript SDK
results.description: The E2B JavaScript SDK allows developers to interact with E2B sandboxes, run commands, manage files, and connect to running processes within the sandbox environment.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox
results.description: E2B Desktop Sandbox is an open-source secure virtual desktop that provides isolated, customizable sandboxes for launching applications and streaming their screens, offering features like password protection.

results.title: Template Toolkit
results.description: The Template Toolkit is a fast, flexible, powerful, and extensible template processing system for generating dynamic web content and other text-based documents like HTML, XML, and LaTeX.

results.title: Code Interpreter
results.description: E2B Code Interpreter is an open-source infrastructure that allows you to run AI-generated code in secure, isolated sandboxes in the cloud, with SDKs available for JavaScript and Python.

results.title: Proyecto 9B FE
results.description: Proyecto 9B FE is a front-end application built using the React + Vite template, offering a minimal setup with Hot Module Replacement (HMR) and ESLint rules for development.

results.title: App Template
results.description: A project template for quickly setting up embedded projects using probe-rs, defmt, and flip-link.

results.title: Aiohttp Jinja2
results.description: jinja2 template renderer for aiohttp.web

results.title: Python Docx Template
results.description: Use a docx as a jinja2 template

results.title: Medusa B2B Starter
results.description: A customizable B2B e-commerce solution built with Medusa 2.0 and a Next.js storefront, featuring company management, spending limits, bulk add-to-cart, quote management, order edits, and approval workflows.

results.title: Enterprise-grade FastAPI Backend Template
results.description: A feature-complete, architecturally clear enterprise-grade FastAPI backend template designed for team development, offering security, performance, and out-of-the-box readiness.

results.title: Cluster Template
results.description: A template for deploying a single Kubernetes cluster on bare-metal or VMs, leveraging Makejinja for configuration and featuring Talos Linux, Flux, sops, and Cloudflare for a robust home-lab setup.

results.title: E2B MCP
results.description: Run Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers securely within E2B sandboxes for safe execution of untrusted tools and code, offering CLI and Python API for AI agents, SaaS, and developer tools.

results.title: React Native Template Obytes
results.description: A production-ready React Native template built with Expo, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS, prioritizing developer experience and performance with features like Expo Router, React Query, and Husky.

results.title: n8n Templates
results.description: Supercharge your workflow automation with this curated collection of n8n templates! Instantly connect your favorite apps-like Gmail, Telegram, Google Drive, Slack, and more-with ready-to-use, AI-powered automations. Save time, boost productivity, and unlock the true potential of n8n in just a few clicks.

results.title: Db2 for Linux, UNIX and Windows
results.description: Db2 for Linux, UNIX and Windows is IBM's relational database management system offering comprehensive data management solutions for various operating environments.

results.title: OXID eShop Module Template
results.description: Reusable module template

results.title: UBold
results.description: UBold is a fully featured premium admin template built on Bootstrap 5, HTML5, CSS3, and jQuery. It provides a responsive and customizable dashboard with many ready-to-use components, widgets, and pages, ideal for various web applications like CRM, CMS, and admin panels.

results.title: Embedded Template Library
results.description: Embedded Template Library

results.title: n8n
results.description: A collection of free n8n templates designed to automate SEO, content optimization, data analysis, and other real-world challenges, saving time and improving workflow efficiency.

results.title: E2E Parsing Test Document
results.description: An auto-generated document containing diverse, self-contained code examples across multiple programming languages, designed to exercise and test parsing in a realistic yet compact way.

results.title: B24UI Starter Vue
results.description: A starter template for developing with Vue 3, TypeScript, Vite, and Bitrix24 UI, providing essential tools and guidance for building applications within the Bitrix24 ecosystem.

results.title: Fashion Starter
results.description: A modern, customizable e-commerce template built with Medusa 2.0, showcasing a sleek design, dynamic product options, and a streamlined checkout flow for fashion brands.

results.title: Enterprise Commerce
results.description: An open-source, enterprise-grade Next.js e-commerce template utilizing Shopify for product data and Algolia for efficient data fetching, searching, and recommendations.
